members.label: curtain
members.long_form_open_description: White vertical vinyl blinds hanging on the left third of the image; they cover the sliding glass door and extend from ceiling to floor. Blinds show soft folds and are partially open toward the center, letting light through.
members.location_relative_to_other_objects: directly left of the sliding/glass door; overlaying left side of the door frame
